description: This file sets up URL routing for a Django REST Framework backend, registering viewsets with a router and defining URL patterns including a health check endpoint.

classes.name: DefaultRouter
classes.description: A router class from Django REST Framework that automatically generates URL patterns for viewsets.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Method of DefaultRouter that registers a viewset with a specific URL prefix and basename.

methods.name: path
methods.description: Function that maps URL patterns to views.

methods.name: include
methods.description: Function that includes other URL configurations.
